response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in geospatial routing pipelines, has no demonstrated work with navigation data, routing tiles, or distributed geospatial systems, and their cited C++ exposure is limited to NI LabWindows™/CVI — a niche embedded tool, not production-scale routing systems.
strengths: Strong full-stack background with diverse tech exposure
Proven experience in open-source geospatial platforms (GISCollective)
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across technical domains
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or geospatial data pipelines
Lacks evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time map update systems
Primary language focus is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not the required C++

key_factors.factor: Lack of C++/Rust in routing context
